Civil War (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $68,757,539Details
International Box Office $58,581,814
Worldwide Box Office $127,339,353
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,496,424
Total $4,496,424
Further financial details...

Synopsis

In the near future, a civil war has erupted between the authoritarian United States government and various secessionist movements. Renowned war photographer Lee Smith saves aspiring photojournalist Jessie from a suicide bombing in New York City. The two set off on a journey to Washington, DC, documenting the horrors of war as go.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$25,537,368 (37.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.69 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:54.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,838 opening theaters/3,929 max. theaters, 4.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $72,709,122

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 12th, 2024 (IMAX) by A24
April 12th, 2024 (Wide) by A24
International Releases: April 11th, 2024 (Wide) (Australia)
April 11th, 2024 (Limited) (New Zealand)
April 11th, 2024 (Wide) (Netherlands)
April 11th, 2024 (Wide), released as Civil War (Судный день) (Russia (CIS))
April 12th, 2024 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: May 24th, 2024 by A24
MPA Rating: R for strong violent content, bloody/disturbing images, and language throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2788 (cert #54275), 6/21/2023)
Running Time: 109 minutes
Film festival: South by Southwest Film Festival 2024
Release detail: Festival Acquisition

Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction

Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom
Languages: English

In the near future, a civil war has erupted between the authoritarian United States government and various secessionist movements.
